news.t: Fidelity® 'Enhances' ETF Lineup With Six New Active Equity Strategies and Reduced Pricing on Factor ETFs

holdings.infoBox: FELV is an equity ETF with a total of 369 individual holdings. The top holdings are Micron Technology stock at 3.15%, Berkshire Hathaway at 3.10%, JPMorgan Chase & Co. at 2.64%, Amazon.com at 2.18%, and Alphabet at 2.16%.

overview.description: The Fidelity Enhanced Large Cap Value ETF (FELV) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund is actively managed, investing in large-cap value stocks belonging to a broad US equity value index. The fund aims for growth of capital FELV was launched on Apr 19, 2007 and is issued by Fidelity.

data.title: Fidelity® 'Enhances' ETF Lineup With Six New Active Equity Strategies and Reduced Pricing on Factor ETFs
data.text: BOSTON--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Fidelity announced the launch of six new active equity ETFs and reduced pricing on factor ETFs.
